case_title: MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. VS. ORAWAN VIPUSITHIMAKUL et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-20-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-20-2011 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO REQUEST OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT VIPUSITHIMAKUL, ORAWAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-31-2011
DECLARATION PER CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP.
NON SERVICE RETURN OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE ORAWAN VIPUSITHIMAKUL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP.
DECLARATION DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE AS TO SUMMONS & COMPLAINT ATTEMPTING TO SERVE DEFT, ORAWAN VIPUSITHIMAKUL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-20-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
